children.name:

Locator: locator('weather-title')
Expected string: "current watches, warnings, and advisories for nevada"
Received string: ""
Call log:
  - expect.toHaveText with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for locator('weather-title')
    9 × locator resolved to <weather-title></weather-title>
      - unexpected value ""
